sidebar-main.name: Sidebar + Main
sidebar-main.description: Collapsible sidebar with header bar and scrollable main content area. Used by saas-dashboard, financial-dashboard, docs-explorer, ecommerce (account pages).

top-nav-main.name: Top Nav + Main
top-nav-main.description: Horizontal navigation bar with full-width main content below. Used by ecommerce (storefront), portfolio, content-site.

centered.name: Centered
centered.description: Centered card on a background. Used for auth flows (login, register, forgot password) across all archetypes.

full-bleed.name: Full Bleed
full-bleed.description: No persistent navigation. Scroll-driven hero-first layout. Used by portfolio landing pages.

minimal-header.name: Minimal Header
minimal-header.description: Slim header with centered content below. Used for checkout flows, focused task pages.
